daikin1:
Building B Mode: Cool (Summer) - Tue. 16:30–21:20 for 73 (Women’s Study) - Wed. 8:00–12:00 for 73 (Women’s Study) - Thu. 7:00–15:10 for 73 (Classical Conversations)
- Thu. 16:30–19:40 for 73 (Awana) - Sun. 8:30–13:00 for 73 (Church)—2 south units - Sun. 8:30–13:00 for 75 (Church)—2 north units - Sun. 15:00–19:20 for 73 (Trek) Mode: Heat (Winter) - Tue. 16:30–21:20 for 68 (Women’s Study) - Wed. 7:00–11:15 for 68 (Women’s Study). Georgia asked for 11:15 off instead of 12:00 - Thu. 6:00–15:10 for 68 (Classical Conversations) - Thu. 17:00–19:40 for 68 (Awana) - Sun. 6:30–13:00 for 67 (Church) - Sun. 15:30–19:20 for 68 (Trek)
